mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE author = #{username} AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks (title, description, due_date, priority, status, category, author, related_notes, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{dueDate}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{category}, #{author}, #{relatedNotes}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, due_date = #{dueDate}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, category = #{category}, related_notes = #{relatedNotes}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
